calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

T. Troy Otus, Esq. appeared for petitioner Lloyd Brockway, the Guardian Ad Litem for the minor, Joshua Brockway.
Petitioner and the minor appeared at today's hearing via telephone.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $23,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $5,576.58.
Costs - $693.69.

The net balance of $16,729.73 shall be deposited into a blocked account with J.P. Morgan Chase Bank, located at 201 North Central Avenue, Phoenix, AZ 85004. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
